# PERF-205 positive: db.Count + db.Offset.Limit.Find in same handler
lang: go
file: PERF-205-vulnerable.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type Order struct {
	ID uint
}

func ListPage(db *gorm.DB, page, size int) (int64, []Order, error) {
	var total int64
	if err := db.Model(&Order{}).Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
		return 0, nil, err
	}
	var orders []Order
	if err := db.Offset(page * size).Limit(size).Find(&orders).Error; err != nil {
		return 0, nil, err
	}
	return total, orders, nil
}
